data.description: Merz and Zelenskyy oversee signing session
German Chancellor Friedrich Merz and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy hold press conference after talks

data.title: NYX Professional Makeup Enters Body Care Category with Launch of New Fat Oil Body Collection
data.description: Makeup brand NYX Professional Makeup has revealed a significant update to its product range, moving beyond traditional face products to introduce the new Fat Oil Body collection. This launch marks the brand's expansion into body products for the first time. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on April 14, 2026. The introduction of the Fat Oil Body collection represents a major shift in NYX's artistry portfolio, bringing a total of [specific number] new products that cater to body beauty needs.

data.title: Dow Chair and CEO Jim Fitterling to Become Executive Chair; Karen S. Carter Appointed Chief Executive Officer
data.description: In Midland, Michigan on April 14th, 2026, Dow made an announcement stating that Jim Fitterling, the current Chair and CEO, will transition to the role of Executive Chair of the Board starting July 1st, 2026. Karen S. Carter, the current Chief Operating Officer, has been appointed by the Dow Board of Directors to succeed Fitterling. Fitterling will continue to serve as Executive Chair while Carter assumes the CEO role. Dow's ticker symbol is NYSE: DOW.

data.title: Hyperscale Data Reports 644.7581 Bitcoin, Cash and Restricted Cash, totalling $93.5 Million, Significantly Exceeding Current Market Capitalization of Company
data.description: Hyperscale Data, Inc. (NYSE American: GPUS) recently disclosed that their total assets in the form of Cash, Restricted Cash, and Bitcoin holdings amount to approximately 143.96% of the company's current market capitalization. This data was made public in Las Vegas on April 14, 2026. Hyperscale Data, Inc. is a prominent artificial intelligence ("AI") data center company.

data.title: VIAVI TTworkbench and M1 Appliance Recognized as Avnu Certification Test Tool for TSN Component Testing
data.description: Today, in Chandler, Arizona, VIAVI Solutions Inc. revealed a new certification that aids in IEEE TSN compliance testing, facilitating multi-vendor interoperability in a unified platform. This certification applies to the TTworkbench gPTP test suite and TestCenter M1. The company's NASDAQ symbol is VIAV.

data.title: PANASONIC AVIONICS LAUNCHES eXNeo BRINGING NEW-GENERATION IFE UPGRADES TO LEGACY CABINS
data.description: In Hamburg, Germany on April 14, 2026, Panasonic Avionics Corporation introduced eXNeo, a cutting-edge seatback monitor retrofit solution. Considered the top provider of in-flight engagement and connectivity (IFEC) solutions globally, Panasonic Avionics aims to revolutionize the in-flight entertainment experience.

data.title: Bitcoin Jumps To $74,000, Ethereum Surges 9%, XRP, Dogecoin Spike 3%
data.description: The price of Bitcoin surged past $74,000 with liquidations reaching $545.67 million in the last day. Bitcoin ETFs experienced $291.1 million in net outflows, while Ethereum ETFs saw $9.44 million in net inflows. The current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $74,576.14, Ethereum at $2,383.20, Solana at $86.28, XRP at $1.37, Dogecoin at $0.09403, and Shiba Inu at $0.005939. Meme coin market capitalization dropped by 3.6% in the past 24 hours to $35.4 billion. For more details, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Matador Resources Company Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release
data.description: Matador Resources Company, listed as MTDR on the NYSE, disclosed intentions to unveil its Q1 2026 operational and financial outcomes post-market closure on May 6, 2026. The firm plans to conduct a live conference call on May 7, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. CT to discuss these results and operational achievements for the mentioned period. For those interested, the details to join the call through phone access are provided in the link: https://regis.

data.title: Major General Dustin A. "Dusty" Shultz, USA (Ret.) Joins Academy Securities' Advisory Board and Geopolitical Intelligence Group
data.description: In New York, Academy Securities, the nation’s first investment bank owned and operated by Post-9/11 veterans, has welcomed Major General Dustin A. "Dusty" Shultz to its Geopolitical Intelligence Group. This group comprises 43 US and UK Admirals & Generals, former NASA Astronauts, and former CIA/FBI Leadership. Over the past decade, Academy has been providing advisory services to clients and is recognized as the top advisor on geostrategic risk in the market. Major General Shultz has joined this esteemed group after retiring from his military service.

data.title: CannaLnx Expands Insured Medical Cannabis Access Across California with 9 Retail and Delivery Partners
data.description: In Cleveland, EM2P2, the provider of the CannaLnx health care platform in the cannabis industry, revealed a substantial expansion in California. They have partnered with nine dispensary and delivery operators, comprising a total of 15 storefronts and various regional delivery networks. This move signifies a noteworthy development in integrating insurance into medical cannabis services, transitioning it from theory to practical application. The expansion is set to cover crucial markets, such as Los Angeles, with a strong presence in various locations.

data.title: Institutional partnerships boost HBAR as it targets $0.12 by May amid technical stagnation and 65% likelihood of hitting it in 30 days.
data.description: HBAR is currently at a crucial point from a technical perspective, as enterprise collaborations are boosting its fundamentals. However, momentum indicators suggest a potential decrease in buyer interest. There is a 65% chance of HBAR testing the $0.12 mark within the next 30 days if certain conditions are met.

data.title: Impending PEPE rejection: 30% drop forecasted within 14 days as price nears resistance at 90% Bollinger Band. Target $0.000005-0.000006 range.
data.description: PEPE's current position at the 90% Bollinger Band resistance, coupled with low trading volume, indicates ongoing distribution. Momentum indicators point to exhaustion, suggesting a potential downward movement towards the $0.000005-0.000006 range.

data.title: "ALGO faces potential drop to $0.08 in 30 days post 12% surge to $0.11, signaling bear market trend continuation."
data.description: Algorand experienced a sharp rebound to $0.11, displaying classic bear market behavior before potentially seeing further decline. The target price within the next 30 days is $0.08, given the current technical structure showing signs of weakness.

data.title: Filecoin approaches $1.10 resistance after crossing $0.90 with 4.6% daily gains, enticing momentum buyers in oversold levels.
data.description: The value of Filecoin has exceeded $0.90, marking a 4.6% daily increase and indicating a potential move towards the $1.10 mark. This positive trend encourages buyers looking to capitalize on momentum, particularly as the technical rebound from oversold conditions appears promising.

data.title: INJ aims for $3.26 in 2-week bullish breakout from $3.02, with a potential drop to $2.70. Key resistance ahead. Time to act!
data.description: The positive momentum of INJ at $3.02 positions it for a potential climb to $3.26 resistance in the next 15 days. The technical analysis suggests a critical decision point is imminent - either a breakout above the resistance level or a retreat to $2.70 support.
